sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: 1RT Acquisition Corp. Units (ONCHU) Alternative Data Analytics - Social & Digital Signals
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of 1RT Acquisition Corp. Units (ONCHU) based on its social and digital signals across various platforms like Facebook, Twitter, YouTube, LinkedIn, Instagram, Glassdoor, and TikTok. It details the company's lack of presence or minimal engagement on these platforms, as indicated by zero followers, posts, or reviews. The analysis emphasizes how these metrics could offer insights into brand loyalty, customer sentiment, marketing effectiveness, and internal culture for investors, despite the current zero data points.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal's Medium-Term Goals Seen as Credible -- Market Talk
feed.summary: This article reports on Bank of Montreal's medium-term goals being viewed as credible, according to Market Talk. It also briefly mentions Unity Software's fourth-quarter financial results, including a 35% year-over-year revenue increase to $609 million, surpassing estimates, and a quarterly loss of 66 cents per share. The full article content for Bank of Montreal's goals requires login.

feed.title: Value Holdings Management CO. LLC Sells 14,000 Shares of EOG Resources, Inc. $EOG
feed.summary: Value Holdings Management CO. LLC reduced its stake in EOG Resources, Inc. by 10.2% in the fourth quarter, selling 14,000 shares and now owning 123,500 shares valued at approximately $12.97 million. Company insiders also sold 14,532 shares recently. Despite these sales, EOG Resources exceeded quarterly earnings and revenue estimates and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.02, while analysts currently hold an average "Hold" rating with a target price of $138.52.

feed.title: Here Are Friday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Brown-Forman, Chord Energy, Emerson Electric, FuboTV, Genmab, Honeywell, Knight-Swift, Wix.Com, and More
feed.summary: This article compiles the top Wall Street analyst upgrades, downgrades, and initiations for Friday, March 27, 2026, featuring companies like Brown-Forman, Chord Energy, Emerson Electric, FuboTV, Genmab, Honeywell, Knight-Swift, and Wix.com. It also provides a market overview, noting a potential fifth straight week of losses for the stock market and increased volatility as the first quarter concludes. The author advises caution for investors amidst geopolitical tensions and rising commodity prices influencing market trends.

feed.title: AutoZone Drops 7% Last Week on Accounting Noise: Why the Math Still Points to $5,231
feed.summary: AutoZone's stock fell 7% last week due to a non-cash LIFO charge that obscured its underlying operating strength, even as net sales climbed and EPS beat consensus. Despite the temporary accounting headwind, analysts and TIKR's valuation model suggest the stock is undervalued, projecting a significant upside as the company's store expansion matures and LIFO charges normalize. The operational momentum, particularly in commercial sales and strategic investments, indicates a strong future for AutoZone.

feed.title: Ecolab (NYSE: ECL) revises segment reporting using 2026 fixed FX rates
feed.summary: Ecolab Inc. (NYSE: ECL) has updated its segment reporting structure, effective January 1, 2026, by reorganizing its former Light & Heavy operating segment into three new segments: Heavy Water, Light Water, and High-Tech, all remaining within the Global Water reportable segment. The company furnished supplemental unaudited data for 2025 and 2024, and quarterly for 2025, restating net sales, costs, and operating income using 2026 fixed currency exchange rates to provide better period-to-period comparability by eliminating foreign exchange fluctuations. For 2025, Ecolab reported GAAP net sales of $16,081.2 million and GAAP operating income of $2,737.6 million, alongside fixed-currency non-GAAP metrics.

feed.title: Today's Analyst Rating | Piper Sandler Cuts Its Price Target Cut on Citigroup to $125, Arm Holdings Price Target Raised to $210 by Jefferies
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has reduced its price target for Citigroup to $125. Concurrently, Jefferies has increased its price target for Arm Holdings to $210, reflecting new analyst assessments for these major companies.

feed.title: Veralto (NYSE: VLTO) outlines 2026 shareholder votes, governance and ESG focus
feed.summary: Veralto Corporation (NYSE: VLTO) has detailed its agenda for the 2026 annual shareholder meeting, which includes votes on director elections, auditor ratification, and an advisory say-on-pay resolution for executive compensation. The company emphasized its strong 2025 financial performance, including $5.5 billion in revenue and double-digit adjusted EPS growth, driven by its Veralto Enterprise System. Veralto also highlighted its robust corporate governance with an independent chair and fully independent committees, alongside a strong focus on ESG initiatives such as emissions reduction targets, water stewardship, and equal pay goals.

feed.title: Packaging Corp of America (NYSE: PKG) details 2026 board, pay and auditor votes
feed.summary: Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE: PKG) has released details for its 2026 Annual Meeting, where shareholders will vote on the election of nine directors, the ratification of KPMG LLP as auditor, and an advisory proposal on executive compensation. The proxy statement highlights the company's strong 2025 financial performance, including increased net sales and earnings per share, as well as its compensation philosophy focused on long-term, performance-based awards. PKG’s executive compensation largely comprises equity tied to Return on Invested Capital (ROIC) and Total Shareholder Return (TSR), and the board unanimously recommends voting for all proposals.

feed.title: Next Technology (NASDAQ: NXTT) closes $157M stock and pre-funded warrant deal
feed.summary: Next Technology Holding Inc. (NASDAQ: NXTT) has successfully closed a registered direct offering, generating approximately $157 million in gross proceeds. The offering involved the sale of 71,381,818 shares of common stock at $1.10 per share and pre-funded warrants to purchase an equal number of shares at $1.099 per warrant. This significant capital raise is intended to support the company's dual-engine strategy focused on AI-enabled SaaS solutions and digital asset holdings, including Bitcoin, though it introduces potential equity dilution.

feed.title: KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) proxy details 2026 votes and 2025 record growth
feed.summary: KeyCorp's recent proxy statement outlines several key proposals for its May 14, 2026, virtual annual meeting, including the election of 14 directors, ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as auditor, an advisory say-on-pay vote, and approval of a new 2026 Equity Compensation Plan. The company highlighted a strong 2025 financial performance with record revenue up 16% year-over-year and significant growth in net interest income and pre-provision net revenue. Additionally, the proxy details KeyCorp's robust capital position, plans for over $1.2 billion in buybacks in 2026, and governance changes made in response to shareholder feedback on executive compensation.

feed.title: Illinois Tool Works (NYSE: ITW) 2026 proxy details and 2025 performance
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) is holding its 2026 annual meeting on May 8, 2026, where shareholders will vote on director elections, executive compensation, auditor ratification, and a non-binding proposal. The company reported strong 2025 financial results with $16 billion in revenue, a 3% increase in GAAP EPS to $10.49, and significant shareholder returns including $3.3 billion in dividends and buybacks. ITW also highlighted the progress of its Customer-Back Innovation (CBI) model, contributing 2.4% to 2025 revenue growth and serving as a key driver for its 2024-2030 "Next Phase" enterprise strategy focused on organic growth.

feed.title: Insiders At W.W. Grainger Sold US$3.0m In Stock, Alluding To Potential Weakness
feed.summary: Over the past year, W.W. Grainger (NYSE: GWW) insiders sold US$3.0 million worth of stock, with the largest sale by CFO Deidra Merriwether for US$1.2 million at US$1,007 per share. Despite insiders owning a significant 8.3% of the company, there have been no insider buys in the last year, leading to a lack of confidence in recent insider transactions. The article suggests investors should look for insider buying as a more beneficial signal than selling.

feed.title: Sweden orders more underwater drones for mine-clearing, EOD work
feed.summary: Teledyne Gavia, a part of Teledyne Marine, announced that the Swedish Defence Materiel Administration (FMV) has placed a follow-on order for additional GAVIA Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUV) and payload modules. This order expands the capabilities of the Swedish Armed Forces in Mine Countermeasures (MCM) and Explosive Ordnance Disposal (EOD) operations. The modular design of the GAVIA systems allows for rapid reconfiguration to meet evolving operational requirements and is part of a multiyear framework agreement for fleet modernization.

feed.title: Intercontinental Exchange Announces New $600 Million Investment in Polymarket
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) has announced a new $600 million direct cash investment in Polymarket as part of a previously arranged investment and Polymarket's equity capital fundraising. This comes after an initial $1 billion investment in October 2025, with ICE also planning to purchase up to $40 million in Polymarket securities from existing holders. These investments are not expected to materially impact ICE's financial results or capital return plans.

feed.title: Organon Debuts New Analysis of VTAMA® (tapinarof) cream, 1%, Phase 3 Pooled Data Demonstrating Early and Consistent Skin Clearance and Itch Improvement in Atopic Dermatitis Patients Down to 2 Years of Age
feed.summary: Organon has presented new data from a post-hoc sub-analysis of its Phase 3 ADORING 1 and ADORING 2 trials for VTAMA® (tapinarof) cream, 1%. The analysis demonstrated early and consistent skin clearance and itch improvement in atopic dermatitis patients as young as two years old. These findings will be presented at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology Annual Meeting.

feed.title: Stifel reiterates Hold on Pool Corp stock amid HVAC market view
feed.summary: Stifel has maintained its Hold rating on Pool Corp (NASDAQ:POOL) and lowered its price target from $240 to $232, following the company's Q4 2025 earnings miss and weaker-than-expected FY 2026 guidance. The stock is currently trading near its 52-week low. Analyst Andrew Carter commented on Pool Corp's Mingledorff's business unit, noting that HVAC supplier power may hinder aggressive greenfield expansion, which Stifel views as a key pressure point.

feed.title: Opera (NASDAQ: OPRA) 2025 20-F flags Google reliance, OPay swings and AI risks
feed.summary: Opera Limited filed its 2025 annual Form 20-F, detailing key risks such as heavy reliance on Google for search-query revenues, intense competition from large tech platforms, and the potential impact of AI on traditional browsing and ad monetization. The report also highlights financial exposures including a significant investment in OPay, which is subject to fair value swings, and holdings of crypto assets. Opera emphasized that it remediated a prior material weakness in internal control over financial reporting by year-end 2025.

feed.title: Colgate Total Partners with Mumbai Indians; PLOT Initiative Rolled Out to Maintain Peak Dental Health
feed.summary: Colgate Total has partnered with the Mumbai Indians as their Dental Performance Partner to emphasize the critical role of oral health in athletic preparation. They've launched the PLOT (Performance Linked Oral Test) initiative, a comprehensive oral health screening framework to maintain peak dental health for players. This partnership highlights how oral health, often overlooked, is a "hidden edge" that directly impacts athletic performance, recovery, and overall well-being.

feed.title: Intercontinental Exchange lands $58 million in permits for Jacksonville divisional HQ
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) has secured permits totaling $58 million for the renovation of its Deerwood Park North campus in Jacksonville, which will serve as the divisional headquarters for ICE Mortgage Technology. These permits cover significant interior and exterior renovations to Building 1 of the former Merrill Lynch campus, which ICE acquired for $42 million in 2025. The total investment in the property, including the permits and the initial purchase, is nearing $103 million, marking a substantial commitment to the Jacksonville area, especially after ICE's acquisition of Black Knight Inc.

feed.title: AT&T Inc Stock: Resilient Telecom Leader with Strategic Connectivity Focus Amid Evolving Wireless La
feed.summary: AT&T Inc. is highlighted as a resilient leader in the U.S. telecommunications sector, focusing on wireless growth and broadband expansion. The company's strategic vision, presented at a recent industry conference, emphasizes integrating 5G and fiber for seamless connectivity while maintaining an attractive dividend yield for investors. Key areas include debt reduction, network investments, and navigating competitive pressures, making it attractive for income-focused North American investors.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line finalizes CEO employment deal worth $48 million
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. announced an employment and equity agreement with CEO John W. Chidsey, effective March 26, 2026. Chidsey will receive an annual base salary of $1.715 million, an annual bonus, and a one-time restricted share unit award valued at approximately $48 million. This equity award is structured as a four-year front-loaded grant with performance-based vesting tied to the company's total shareholder return.

feed.title: Wells Fargo downgrades Amcor (AMCR) to equal weight with a $43 price target
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has downgraded Amcor (AMCR) to an "equal weight" rating, setting a price target of $43. This move indicates a revised outlook on the company's stock performance.

feed.title: New Norwegian Cruise Line CEO gets $48M stock grant tied to returns
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings has announced an employment and equity award agreement for its new President and CEO, John W. Chidsey. The package includes a $1.715 million base salary, a fixed $2.9 million bonus for 2026, and a one-time "front-loaded" equity grant valued at approximately $48 million. This equity award, consisting of Restricted Share Units (RSUs) and Performance Share Units (PSUs), is designed to align his incentives with long-term shareholder value, with PSU vesting tied to ambitious Total Shareholder Return (TSR) Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) targets over four years.

feed.title: BofA cuts C.H. Robinson stock price target on ocean rate outlook
feed.summary: BofA Securities has lowered its price target for C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) to $219 from $225, while maintaining a Buy rating. The adjustment is based on an outlook for ocean net revenue to decline 20% year-over-year, despite expected increases in Global Forwarding gross profit margins and air net revenues. The stock is currently considered overvalued by InvestingPro analysis, trading at a P/E ratio of 34.84, with weak overall gross profit margins.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Has $11.83 Million Stock Holdings in Prudential Financial, Inc. $PRU

feed.title: Hershey Company (The) $HSY Shares Sold by Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC

feed.title: Viking Fund Management LLC Has $9.63 Million Holdings in Exxon Mobil Corporation $XOM
feed.summary: Viking Fund Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in Exxon Mobil (XOM) by 36% in Q4, selling 45,000 shares but still holding 80,000 shares valued at $9.63 million. Despite this, several brokerages have raised price targets for XOM, though the consensus remains a "Hold" with a target price of $148.89. Insiders have been net sellers, while Exxon Mobil reported stronger-than-expected quarterly earnings and continues to pay a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Increases Stake in General Mills, Inc. $GIS
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC recently increased its stake in General Mills (NYSE:GIS) by 22.7% to 263,466 shares, now valued at approximately $11.545 million. This increase comes despite General Mills missing quarterly earnings expectations, with EPS of $0.64 against a $0.73 consensus and an 8.4% year-over-year revenue decline. The company announced a quarterly dividend of $0.61 per share, offering a ~6.8% yield, while several analysts have lowered price targets, resulting in an average "Reduce" rating for the stock.

feed.title: Form DEFA14A 3M CO
feed.summary: This article announces that 3M Company (MMM) has filed a Form DEFA14A with the SEC, which is a definitive additional materials filing related to a proxy statement. The filing is pursuant to Section 14(a) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 and indicates that no fee is required.

feed.title: If You Bought Lucid, Nio, or Rivian Stock 5 Years Ago, Here’s How Much You’ve Lost
feed.summary: This article examines the significant losses investors would have incurred by purchasing Lucid, Nio, or Rivian stock five years ago. Lucid saw a 96.3% loss since its 2021 SPAC merger, while Nio and Rivian also experienced substantial declines of 84.6% and 84.9% respectively during similar periods. Despite initial high hopes for these EV startups, competitive pressures and execution challenges led to poor financial performance compared to the S&P 500's growth.

feed.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From FactSet Research Stock Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
feed.summary: FactSet Research Systems Inc. (NYSE: FDS) is set to release its Q2 earnings on March 31, with analysts expecting an increase in EPS and revenue. Investors looking to earn $500 monthly from FDS's 2.24% annual dividend yield would need to invest approximately $268,301, or about 1,367 shares. The article also explains how dividend yield is calculated and how it can fluctuate based on stock price and dividend payment changes.

feed.title: BTIG reiterates Neutral on Oxford Industries stock amid mixed results
feed.summary: BTIG has reiterated a Neutral rating on Oxford Industries (NYSE:OXM) after the company's recent quarterly results showed a mixed performance. While the top-line was largely in line with expectations, earnings per share missed consensus, partly due to charges from the Saks bankruptcy. Despite challenges like weather headwinds and underperforming Lilly Pulitzer, the company saw improving trends at Tommy Bahama, and BTIG remains on the sidelines, awaiting more durable improvements given the challenging consumer environment.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC) Rating Increased to Strong-Buy at Jefferies Financial Group
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has upgraded Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC) to a "strong-buy" rating. This upgrade comes as several other analysts have also issued ratings on WFC, leading to a consensus of "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $96.98. The article also details recent insider selling activity and hedge fund movements related to Wells Fargo stock.

feed.title: Global X Japan Co. Ltd. Has $2.37 Million Stock Holdings in Teradyne, Inc. $TER

However, the stock currently trades at a high P/E ratio and has recently experienced an 8.0% decline, indicating potential valuation and short-term pullback risks.

feed.title: Truist Financial (NYSE:TFC) Stock Rating Upgraded by Jefferies Financial Group
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has upgraded Truist Financial (NYSE:TFC) stock to a "moderate sell" rating. The company recently missed its earnings estimates and announced a $10 billion share buyback plan.

feed.title: Global X Japan Co. Ltd. Acquires 7,663 Shares of Cadence Design Systems, Inc. $CDNS
